query:
SELECT 
  segment,
  COUNT(*) as unsent_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone LIKE '+1%' AND LENGTH(phone) = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as valid_e164,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone NOT LIKE '+1%' OR LENGTH(phone) != 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_normalization,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone2 IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(phone2) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_phone2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(email) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email
FROM customers
WHERE smsCampaignSent = 0
GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY FIELD(segment, 'recent', 'lapsed', 'unknown');

  SUM(CASE WHEN phone NOT LIKE '+1%' OR LENGTH(phone) != 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_normalization,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone2 IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(phone2) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_phone2,
